ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level required to equip the item */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense value of the item */,
  "effects" TEXT /* Description of effects the item provides */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Weapon, Armor, Consumable) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary) */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the item */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Overall quality of the item */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's icon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the effect does */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the effect (e.g., Buff, Debuff, Stat) */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Strength of the effect */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds or turns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_jobs" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job (character class) that can equip the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job/class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "primary_attribute" TEXT /* Primary attribute of the job (e.g., Strength, Intelligence) */,
  "secondary_attribute" TEXT /* Secondary attribute of the job (e.g., Agility, Vitality) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the job's icon */,
  "level_cap" INTEGER /* Maximum level a character of this job can reach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category's icon */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of items in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_category_mapping" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that the item belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_balancing" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "balance_factor" REAL /* Factor used to balance the item in gameplay */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the item was last reviewed for balance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the item's balance */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who last reviewed the item */,
  "review_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of reviews in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)
column_names: Level required to equip the item
Description of effects the item provides
